cocktails.name: Raspberry Collins
cocktails.desc: Our fruity take on a traditional Tom Collins. Raspberry puree, Gin, Lemon Juice and sugar syrup served long and topped up with soda

cocktails.name: The Pornstar Martini
cocktails.desc: Vodka, passoa, lime, vanilla and passionfruit syrup, pineapple and a shot of Prosecco

cocktails.name: Long Island Iced Tea
cocktails.desc: A blend of 5 liqueurs. Vodka, gin, white rum, tequila, triple sec with a splash of cola and lemon juice

cocktails.name: Sours
cocktails.desc: Whiskey, Amaretto or limoncello, lemon juice, sugar syrup and egg white

cocktails.name: Espresso Martini
cocktails.desc: Vodka, Tia Maria, vanilla syrup, fresh shot of espresso

cocktails.name: Margarita
cocktails.desc: Tequila, triple sec and lime juice, served straight up with a salted rim

cocktails.name: French Martini
cocktails.desc: A New York favourite brought to Low Fell. A sweet blend of blackberries, muddled with vodka, raspberry liqueur and pineapple juice

cocktails.name: Mojito
cocktails.desc: A Cuban classic! A refreshing blend of muddled limes, sugar syrup, white rum & fresh mint topped up with soda

cocktails.name: Old Fashioned
cocktails.desc: Whiskey, Angostura bitters, brown sugar and orange peel garnish

cocktails.name: Ice Lolly
cocktails.desc: The Bank's signature cocktail. Lychee liqueur, Midori, strawberry syrup and pineapple juice. Layered to make a colourful, refreshing smooth cocktail

cocktails.name: Dark & Stormy
cocktails.desc: Ginger beer, topped with dark rum and a squeeze of fresh lime

cocktails.name: Very Berry
cocktails.desc: A berry nice mix of amaretto, raspberry liqueur and strawberry puree mixed with vanilla syrup, fresh lime and pineapple juice

cocktails.name: Bloody Mary
cocktails.desc: Vodka, tomato juice, Worcester sauce, lemon juice & black pepper

cocktails.name: Pina Colada
cocktails.desc: White rum and coconut rum with just enough cream and pineapple juice. A tropical classic!

cocktails.name: Aperol Spritz / Lemon Spritz
cocktails.desc: Sipping on Italian sunshine. Your choice of aperol or limoncello topped up with prosecco and soda

sundayNote: Serving Tapas and Main Menu only. Please note we do not serve Sunday lunch.

reviews.author: Lisa C.
reviews.quote: 1st time visiting and would definitely return. Highly recommended their bottomless brunch — staff couldn't do enough for you, very friendly and fantastic atmosphere.

reviews.author: BDavis
reviews.quote: We shared the 5 Tapas Board which was delicious — every dish was packed with flavour. Our server Abbie was so pleasant and attentive. The atmosphere was lively but relaxed, ideal for catching up after work. Would definitely recommend.

reviews.author: Colette J.
reviews.quote: Love this place! The best pint of Guinness on the fell, can always have a good chat with the bar staff. Food is amazing as well!

reviews.author: FrequentFlier
reviews.quote: Tried the Bank Smash Burger — it was fantastic! Juicy, flavoursome, and cooked perfectly. Easily one of the best burgers I've had in a while. Perfect place for good food, great cocktails, and a relaxed night out.

reviews.author: Eric M.
reviews.quote: We took our grandchildren for a treat for mocktails. The staff were so friendly and helpful — they worked out the best deal for drinks and even brought some chips. Such a great welcome and wonderful service.

reviews.author: Joanne G.
reviews.quote: I've taken my elderly mum, who is a wheelchair user, to The Bank twice for lunch and each time the meals were very good. The staff are very courteous and made sure mum had everything she needed. I recommend this bar restaurant without reservation.
